description_long: This house is a modern, multi-level residence built into a sloped terrain, featuring a flat roof and clean, angular lines. The structure is predominantly white with large glass windows and blue-tinted glazing, providing expansive views and natural light. The house includes a prominent driveway leading to a garage or covered entry, and several outdoor terraces or balconies. The building is set on a dark, angular base that mimics the surrounding landscape, suggesting integration with a hillside or elevated plot. The design emphasizes horizontal planes and open spaces, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functionality. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with a strong emphasis on geometric forms and open sightlines.
description: A modern, multi-level house with flat roofs, large glass windows, and white exterior, built into a sloped, dark landscape. Features include a driveway, terraces, and a sleek, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main driveway, entryway, and multiple terraces with large glass windows.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the house's integration with the sloped terrain and the flat roof sections.
description_view_2: Rear-right view emphasizing the elongated structure, glass facades, and the angular base.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the driveway, entry area, and the stepped design of the house on the hillside.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass walls
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wide steps, and a minimalistic door adjacent to the driveway
